# Security & API Keys
.env
*.pem

# Python Virtual Environments & Cache
.venv/
venv/
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*$py.class

# Local Middleware Logs & Temporary AI Memory
logs/
memory_archive/
system_cache/
proof_uploads/

# OS Generated Files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Research Manuscripts (Failsafe to ensure papers are never pushed)
*.docx
*.rtf
*manuscript*
